message:
docs: redesign architecture diagram — reduce arrow congestion and label overlap

Restructured from 6-row 4-column layout to 5-row 3-column: SDK flanked
by Graphviz/Zig horizontally, outputs in one clean row below. Reduced
12 nodes to 9 by merging .excalidraw + .drawmode.ts into one output node.
Separated layout/positions labels with labelPosition: start/end.
